title: selago amboensis
intro: Selago amboensis, also known as the Cape alkanet, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to act as a natural dye, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Selago amboensis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
